## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### RTK / Tool Output Guardrails
*~5,081 tokens/session saved*
- For Pylint SWE-bench tasks, do not repeatedly re-read `pylint/lint/pylinter.py` in small slices; build a symbol map first, then read the whole file or one large range once with a raised output limit.
- If a `find` over `.forge/swe-bench/pylint-dev__pylint-*` is needed to locate tests/fixtures, run one scoped `find <dir> -maxdepth ... | sort` and reuse the result instead of repeating variants.

### Pylint SWE-Bench Paths
*~1,800 tokens/session saved*
- Pylint recursive file discovery and ignore-paths logic is centered in `pylint/lint/pylinter.py` and `pylint/lint/expand_modules.py`; inspect these together before widening search.
- Relevant tests for recursive discovery/ignore behavior are under `tests/lint/unittest_lint.py`, `tests/lint/unittest_expand_modules.py`, and `tests/test_self.py`.

### Forge Harness Web / Shell Rules
*~900 tokens/session saved*
- Inside Forge harness sessions, use `mcp__forge__web_search`/`mcp__forge__web_fetch` for any web access and `mcp__forge__shell`/`mcp__forge__read_file` for repo commands/files; do not switch to native browsing tools.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
